a.label:
👑 Charles II of Naples 'the Lame'
1254-1309 · King of Naples · Wikipedia

b.label:
Mary of Hungary
1257-1323 · Queen of Naples, Arpad princess · Wikipedia

children.label:
👑 Robert 'the Wise'
1276-1343 · King of Naples, succeeded his father · Wikipedia

families.note: Charles II of Naples & Mary of Hungary -> Margaret of Anjou-Naples (1st wife of Charles of Valois) + brother Robert the Wise, King of Naples. NOTE: SPI_MARG_ANJOU_NAPLES (batch d4) and SPH_MARGARET_ANJOU_NAPLES (batch u2) are DUPLICATE round-1 ids for the same historical woman (Margaret/Marguerite, Countess of Anjou, dau. of Charles II of Naples) — both linked here to avoid a second fabricated parent set. Wikipedia 'Margaret of Anjou, Countess of Anjou'.

d.1237 · 3rd wife of John of Brienne; dau. of Alfonso IX of León · Wikipedia

families.note: Louis de Brienne, Viscount of Beaumont (father of Henry de Beaumont), is son of John of Brienne, King of Jerusalem (existing SPG_JOHNBRIENNE, from his 3rd marriage) & Berengaria of León. Wikipedia 'John of Brienne'.

children.label:
👑 Edmund 'Crouchback'
1245-1296 · 1st Earl of Lancaster; younger son of Henry III · Wikipedia

families.note: Edmund Crouchback, 1st Earl of Lancaster, is son of Henry III of England (existing HIII) & Eleanor of Provence (existing EOP), full brother of Edward I. Union merges with existing HIII+EOP marriage. Wikipedia 'Edmund Crouchback'.

children.label:
Thomas, 2nd Earl of Lancaster
c.1278-1322 · leader of baronial opposition to Edward II; executed · Wikipedia

families.note: Henry, 3rd Earl of Lancaster, is son of Edmund Crouchback & his 2nd wife Blanche of Artois (her 2nd marriage, after Henry I of Navarre — cross-links to Joan I of Navarre's family above). Full brother Thomas, 2nd Earl of Lancaster, added. Wikipedia 'Henry, 3rd Earl of Lancaster'.

a.label:
Alexander Comyn of Buchan
d.c.1308 · brother of John Comyn, 3rd Earl of Buchan · Wikipedia

families.note: Alice Comyn, Countess of Buchan (suo jure heir after the Comyn forfeiture), per Wikipedia 'Alice Comyn, Countess of Buchan' is daughter of Alexander Comyn of Buchan; mother not documented. Moderate-confidence identification — flagged.

SPG_AFONSO4PORTUGAL (this batch) is a DUPLICATE round-1 id for Afonso IV of Portugal, already present as SPI_AFONSO4_PORTUGAL (child of King Denis I & St. Elizabeth of Aragon, batch u3). Reusing those existing parent ids rather than fabricating new ones; union merges with the existing Denis I + Elizabeth of Aragon marriage.

b.label:
María Alfonso de Meneses 'de Ulloa'
fl.1290s · mistress of Sancho IV of Castile · Wikipedia

families.note: Beatrice of Castile (queen of Afonso IV of Portugal) is an illegitimate daughter of Sancho IV of Castile (existing SANCHOIV) & his mistress María Alfonso de Meneses ('de Ulloa'); Sancho's official wife was Maria de Molina (existing MARIAMOLINA). Wikipedia 'Beatrice of Castile, Queen of Portugal'.

a.label:
Goronwy ap Tudur
14th c. · of Penmynydd, Anglesey; Ednyfed Fychan lineage · Bartrum, Welsh Genealogies

families.note: Tudur Fychan ap Goronwy's father is Goronwy ap Tudur, per the standard Penmynydd Tudor pedigree (Ednyfed Fychan -> Goronwy ap Ednyfed -> Tudur ap Goronwy -> Goronwy ap Tudur -> Tudur Fychan ap Goronwy), as summarized in Wikipedia's 'House of Tudor' ancestry section / P.C. Bartrum's Welsh genealogical tracts. Mother not recorded.

Full sister Marie of Valois added. Wikipedia 'Isabella of Valois, Duchess of Bourbon'.

SPE_PEDROI (this batch, Peter I of Portugal) is a DUPLICATE round-1 id for the same person as SPG_PETER1PORTUGAL (child of Afonso IV of Portugal & Beatrice of Castile, batch u1, alongside sister Maria of Portugal). Reusing the existing parent ids (both also this batch's items) rather than duplicating them.

families.note: Henry II 'of Trastámara' (twin of Fadrique Alfonso, per his own label) and Sancho Alfonso, 1st Count of Alburquerque, are — together with Fadrique — illegitimate sons of Alfonso XI of Castile (existing ALFONSOXI) & his longtime mistress Eleanor de Guzmán; Alfonso's official wife was Maria of Portugal (existing MARIAPORT). Brother Tello, Lord of Biscay, added. Wikipedia 'Henry II of Castile' / 'Eleanor de Guzmán'.
